name: funnel-state-machine
description: Runtime state machine for Web2App milestone commits, completed-session page states, and authenticated account data loading.

storageScope.newTabPolicy: new browser tab starts a new Web2App visitor session
storageScope.startNewPlanPolicy: clear answers, identity, selected plan, checkout, subscription, entitlements, answer queue, and committedPhase in the current tab before routing to the first OB question

guards.urlAccess: URLs are generally navigable; do not hard-redirect solely because page.phase is earlier than committedPhase
guards.closedSessionPageState: when committedPhase is paid/account and page.phase is onboarding/result/paywall/checkout, render completed-session actions instead of active quiz/checkout controls
guards.authenticatedAccountData: subscription and entitlement calls require uid and Firebase idToken
guards.protectedPostPaymentPages: payment success, account creation, account, subscription management, and cancellation pages require an existing session identity and must not create anonymous identity
